commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=3478e475d852f7f73246ca37b00173c8d6fe9b57)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds MiniMax-M3 to Tachikoma's MiniMax model enum/capabilities, parser/provider routing, mocked multimodal provider coverage, docs, and an Unreleased changelog entry.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a feature PR. Source inspection confirms current main lacks MiniMax-M3 and the branch adds the new model surface.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed because automation cannot supply the contributor's real MiniMax-M3 vision proof, and the release-owned changelog edit should be removed before merge.

target.title: feat(models): add MiniMax-M3 with vision support
target.body:
## Summary

Adds first-class `MiniMax-M3` support for global and China Anthropic-compatible routes, including the model's 1M context window and multimodal image input.

## Changes

- Adds `LanguageModel.MiniMax.m3` with 1M context and vision/tool capabilities.
- Routes M3 through `LanguageModel.parse`, `ModelSelector`, and `ProviderParser` for global and China provider aliases.
- Verifies the official Anthropic-compatible endpoint, bearer authorization, M3 model id, and encoded image payload with mocked transport coverage.
- Documents M3 and credits @Tugser in the changelog.

## Primary contracts

- [Official MiniMax M3 model card](https://huggingface.co/MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M3) identifies `MiniMax-M3` as the public multimodal model and documents its 1M context window.
- [MiniMax model documentation](https://platform.minimax.io/docs/guides/models-intro) documents the current provider model family.

## Proof

Exact head: `3478e475d852f7f73246ca37b00173c8d6fe9b57`

- `swiftformat --lint .` — clean (186 files checked; 22 skipped)
- `swiftlint lint --strict` — clean (180 files; 0 violations)
- `TACHIKOMA_TEST_MODE=mock swift test --no-parallel` — 764 tests in 103 suites passed
- `$autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main` — clean; no accepted/actionable findings
- Authenticated text call through Tachikoma's public `generate` API and default global endpoint — exact token `MINIMAX_LIVE_OK` returned

```text
result=PASS provider=minimax endpoint=default mode=text token=MINIMAX_LIVE_OK
```

Authenticated vision proof remains the final merge gate. No image was uploaded without explicit content-and-destination approval.
target.author: tugser
